name: docyrus-architect
description: Use the Docyrus Architect MCP tools to manage data sources, fields, enums, apps, custom queries, and query data in the Docyrus platform. Use when the user asks to create, update, delete, or query data sources, fields, enum options, apps, or custom query templates via the docyrus-architect MCP server. Also use when building reports, dashboards, or performing data analysis that requires querying Docyrus data sources or running custom SQL templates with filters, aggregations, formulas, pivots, o...
